utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final plan includes all 5 keys. Now check if each is fully specified with all details (physical and mental health insurance with costs; home/contents with costs; travel with costs; enhancement services with costs; total budget monthly/annual breakdown). Health: lists two plans with monthly costs but does not explicitly state physical and mental coverage; however names imply health and mental (WellMind) but not explicit coverage details beyond cost. Property: lists home and fine art/electronics with costs; acceptable for home/contents though no deductible/limits details. Travel: provides two plans with costs but no coverage details. Additional services: lists concierge with cost. Total budget: gives only monthly total, no annual breakdown. Therefore, while all items are present with costs, several lack the detailed coverage specifications requested, and total budget lacks complete monthly/annual breakdown. Counting as ‘fully specified with all details,’ only additional_services (has service and cost) arguably meets, but the requirement is to include any enhancement services with costs—this is satisfied. Total_budget requires complete monthly/annual—only monthly provided, so not fully specified. Health requires physical and mental with costs—mental implied but not explicit; still counts? The prompt says 'with costs'; stricter reading: require both domains explicitly. Not fully specified. Property requires home/contents with costs—contents protection is included; acceptable. Travel requires travel insurance with costs—provided. Thus fully specified items: property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services = 3/5.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists items that must be matched to the ground-truth rated options. The plan includes: HealthFirst Premium India and WellMind Family Plan for health; ParisHome Luxury Coverage and Fine Art & Electronics Protection for property; FamilyGlobal Platinum and Business Travel Extension for travel; and Family Insurance Concierge as an additional service. None of these exact names appear in the ground-truth ratings. The ground-truth health options include HealthFirst Standard Plan (rating 7), but there is no HealthFirst Premium India or WellMind Family Plan. Property options include PrimeHome Premium Coverage and EliteHome Premium Coverage, but not ParisHome Luxury Coverage or Fine Art & Electronics Protection. Travel options include PrimeTravel Premium Plan and EliteTravel Premium Plan, but not FamilyGlobal Platinum or Business Travel Extension. Additional/general services listed do not include Family Insurance Concierge. Therefore, none of the items in the final coverage plan can be mapped to a rated item by exact name.
